title: confiture migrate validate --check-function-uniqueness --format json
description: Static function-uniqueness report: every `CREATE FUNCTION` / `CREATE PROCEDURE` across the configured DDL directories must have a unique fully-qualified signature (`schema.name(arg_types)`).

object_name.description: Qualified callable name (schema.name) — no argument types.

message.description: Human-readable description including the list of files that define this signature and the recommended remediation.

file_path.description: Path of the first file that defines this signature, in lexicographic order.
